common.title: Greenity Foundation Bangladesh
common.mission: Ensuring a greener and more sustainable Bangladesh

stories.title: Stories of Change
stories.subtitle: Real impact, real voices. Explore how our community is transforming Bangladesh's landscape.
stories.author: By
stories.no_stories: New stories are being documented. Check back soon.

donate.title: Empower Change
donate.subtitle: Your contribution directly funds plastic removal, reforestation, and community education in Bangladesh.
donate.name: Full Name
donate.secure_notice: Your donation is secure and encrypted.
donate.impact_notice: Every 1,000 BDT removes 5kg of plastic from our oceans.

hero.subtitle: Working together for a sustainable and green future for our nation.

crisis.title: Turning the Tide on Plastic Pollution.
crisis.subtitle: Plastic doesn't just disappear. It breaks down into microplastics, entering our food chain and destroying marine life. Our mission is to stop the flow of plastic at the source and restore our ecosystem.
crisis.stat: 8 million tons of plastic enter our oceans every year.

points.cleanups: Community-led beach and river cleanups across Bangladesh.
points.education: Education programs for sustainable, plastic-free living.
points.policy: Policy advocacy for a nationwide ban on single-use plastics.

cta.title: Ready to help us ensure a greener Bangladesh?
cta.subtitle: Join 850+ volunteers and thousands of supporters in our journey towards a sustainable future.

about.title: Dedicated to a Greener Future.
about.mission_text: To empower local communities in Bangladesh to take lead in environmental preservation, focusing on plastic waste reduction and reforestation.
about.vision_text: A plastic-free Bangladesh where nature and progress coexist in perfect harmony, ensuring a healthy environment for generations to come.

values.transparency_desc: Every kilogram of plastic removed and every tree planted is documented and verified.
values.community_desc: We believe real change starts at the grassroots level.
values.innovation_desc: Utilizing technology and creative thinking to solve environmental crises.

programs.title: Our Active Programs
programs.subtitle: Concrete actions for a cleaner, greener tomorrow.

items.beach_cleanup_desc: Regular community-driven cleanups to remove plastic and restore the natural beauty of our coastlines.
items.reforestation_desc: A nationwide initiative to plant indigenous trees and restore biodiversity in urban and rural Bangladesh.
items.education_desc: Empowering the next generation with the knowledge and tools for sustainable living.
items.policy_desc: Working with local governments to implement stricter regulations on single-use plastics.

contact.title: Let's Connect for a Greener Nation.
contact.subtitle: Join our mission to ensure a greener and more sustainable Bangladesh. We welcome collaborators, volunteers, and supporters.
contact.involved_text: Interested in volunteering or partnering with us for environmental awareness initiatives?

volunteer.title: Join the Movement
volunteer.subtitle: Become a catalyst for environmental change. Your skills and passion can help us restore Bangladesh's natural beauty.

form.message: Why do you want to join Greenity?
form.success_message: Thank you for your interest in joining Greenity Foundation. Our team will review your application and get in touch shortly.

transparency.title: Ecological Ledger
transparency.subtitle: Radical transparency in action. Track the real-time conversion of resources into verified environmental impact.

gamification.title: Community Impact Board
gamification.subtitle: Celebrating the individuals leading Bangladesh's environmental restoration.

gallery.title: Trash to Treasure
gallery.subtitle: A visual catalog of the circular economy. Witness the transformation of waste into value.

beach-cleanup.title: Beach & River Restoration
beach-cleanup.subtitle: A multi-pronged strategy to extract synthetic waste from Bangladesh's vital water bodies.

methods.title: Sub-Surface Extraction
methods.desc: Utilizing specialized equipment to retrieve submerged waste.

methods.title: Community Sweeps
methods.desc: Weekly mobilization of local volunteers for surface-level cleanup.

methods.title: Waste Filtration
methods.desc: Precision filtering to extract secondary microplastics from sand.

reforestation.title: 1 Million Native Trees
reforestation.subtitle: Expanding Bangladesh's carbon sinks through strategic, indigenous reforestation.

methods.title: Heat Mapping
methods.desc: Identifying priority urban heat zones for maximum cooling impact.

methods.title: Indigenous Sourcing
methods.desc: Using only native species to ensure ecological resilience.

methods.title: Community Custody
methods.desc: Partnering with locals to ensure long-term sapling survival.

education.title: Eco-Literacy in Schools
education.subtitle: Empowering the next generation with the tools for a plastic-free future.

methods.title: Green Classrooms
methods.desc: Integrating environmental science into local curricula.

methods.title: Zero-Waste Labs
methods.desc: Hands-on training in recycling and waste segregation.

methods.title: Eco-Clubs
methods.desc: Supporting student-led sustainability initiatives in rural schools.

policy.title: National Policy Advocacy
policy.subtitle: Bridging the gap between grassroots action and systemic legislative change.

methods.title: Legal Frameworks
methods.desc: Proposing bans on single-use plastics at the municipal level.

methods.title: Compliance Audits
methods.desc: Monitoring industrial adherence to environmental regulations.

methods.title: Public Consensus
methods.desc: Mobilizing nationwide support for sustainable economic policies.
